name: tokentrack
description: Track Token Usage across AI editors - Codex, Claude Code, Cursor.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: dashboard
commands.title: Dashboard
commands.description: View token usage across Codex, Claude Code, and Cursor.

commands.name: claude-quick-usage
commands.title: Quick Usage Claude Code
commands.description: Show Claude Code spend against your monthly budget.

commands.name: codex-quick-usage
commands.title: Quick Usage Codex
commands.description: Show Codex spend against your rolling weekly budget.

commands.name: cursor-quick-usage
commands.title: Quick Usage Cursor
commands.description: Show Cursor spend against your monthly budget.

commands.name: menu-bar-budget
commands.title: Budget Menu Bar
commands.description: Show Claude, Codex, and Cursor budget usage in the menu bar.

preferences.name: currency
preferences.title: Currency
preferences.description: Currency code used to format estimated spend.

preferences.name: claudeBudget
preferences.title: Claude Monthly Budget
preferences.description: Monthly Anthropic spend cap for the current calendar month.

preferences.name: codexBudget
preferences.title: Codex Weekly Budget
preferences.description: Weekly Codex spend cap for the current rolling 7-day window (anchored to first use).

preferences.name: cursorBudget
preferences.title: Cursor Monthly Budget
preferences.description: Monthly Cursor spend cap for the current calendar month.

preferences.name: defaultSource
preferences.title: Default Source
preferences.description: Provider shown first when opening the dashboard.

title: Token Track
author: liel_azulay
